description: Evidence comparison visualization: CG4860 vs Arc42 as SCAD orthologs, including sequence identity heatmap and functional evidence comparison
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 6))

# Panel A: Sequence identity heatmap
labels = ['CG4860', 'Arc42', 'Hs ACADS', 'Hs IVD', 'Dro IVD']
# Identity matrix (from pairwise alignments)
identity_matrix = np.array([
    [100.0, 62.1, 57.1, 36.4, 37.5],   # CG4860
    [62.1, 100.0, 71.1, 37.6, 0],       # Arc42 (Dro IVD not computed)
    [57.1, 71.1, 100.0, 0, 0],          # Hs ACADS
    [36.4, 37.6, 0, 100.0, 0],          # Hs IVD
    [37.5, 0, 0, 0, 100.0],             # Dro IVD
])
# Fill missing with NaN for display
identity_display = identity_matrix.copy()
identity_display[identity_display == 0] = np.nan

ax = axes[0]
im = ax.imshow(identity_display, cmap='YlOrRd', vmin=30, vmax=100, aspect='auto')
ax.set_xticks(range(len(labels)))
ax.set_yticks(range(len(labels)))
ax.set_xticklabels(labels, rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=9)
ax.set_yticklabels(labels, fontsize=9)
ax.set_title('Pairwise Sequence Identity (%)\n(BLOSUM62 alignment)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Add text annotations
for i in range(len(labels)):
    for j in range(len(labels)):
        val = identity_display[i, j]
        if not np.isnan(val):
            color = 'white' if val > 65 else 'black'
            ax.text(j, i, f'{val:.1f}', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, color=color, fontweight='bold')
        else:
            ax.text(j, i, 'n/d', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='gray')

plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, shrink=0.8)

# Panel B: Evidence summary bar chart
ax2 = axes[1]
evidence_categories = [
    'Sequence identity\nto Hs ACADS',
    'Catalytic Glu\nconservation',
    'Domain\narchitecture',
    'In vivo SCAD\nphenotype (LOF)',
    'Acylcarnitine\nprofile match'
]
cg4860_scores = [57.1, 100, 100, 0, 0]  # Percent or binary (100=yes, 0=no)
arc42_scores = [71.1, 100, 100, 100, 100]

x = np.arange(len(evidence_categories))
width = 0.35

bars1 = ax2.bar(x - width/2, cg4860_scores, width, label='CG4860', color='#e74c3c', alpha=0.8)
bars2 = ax2.bar(x + width/2, arc42_scores, width, label='Arc42', color='#2ecc71', alpha=0.8)

ax2.set_ylabel('Score / Identity %', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_title('CG4860 vs Arc42: Evidence for\nSCAD Function', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xticks(x)
ax2.set_xticklabels(evidence_categories, fontsize=8)
ax2.legend(fontsize=10)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 115)
ax2.axhline(y=50, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)

# Add value labels on bars
for bar in bars1:
    height = bar.get_height()
    if height > 0:
        ax2.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., height + 1, f'{height:.0f}',
                ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')
    else:
        ax2.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., 3, 'No',
                ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')

for bar in bars2:
    height = bar.get_height()
    ax2.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., height + 1, f'{height:.0f}',
            ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: evidence_comparison.png")
